title: Bumble Inc. (BMBL) Q1 2024 Earnings: Revenue and Earnings Exceed Expectations
text: Bumble Inc. reported Q1 2024 results that demonstrated strong operational momentum. The company generated $267.8 million in revenue, representing 10.2% year-over-year growth. Net earnings reached $33.9 million, a substantial turnaround from a $2.3 million loss in the prior year period. The adjusted EBITDA metric improved to $74.0 million, or 27.6% of revenue, compared to $59.3 million (24.4% margin) previously, indicating enhanced profitability and operational efficiency. Bumble's user base expanded to 4.0 million paying users from 3.5 million year-over-year. The Bumble app specifically saw paying users increase 18% to 2.7 million. However, average revenue per paying user declined slightly to $21.84 from $22.83. CEO Lidiane Jones emphasized the relaunch of the Bumble app as a key step in the company's evolution, focusing on user experience enhancement. The company increased its share repurchase authorization from $300 million to $450 million. For Q2 2024, management guided for revenue between $269-$275 million and adjusted EBITDA of $69-$73 million. Full-year expectations include 8-11% revenue growth with at least 300 basis points of margin improvement.
